2604.12874.title: LIFE -- an energy efficient advanced continual learning agentic AI framework for frontier systems
2604.12874.paper_summary: The rapid advancement of AI has changed the character of HPC usage such as dimensioning, provisioning, and execution. Not only has energy demand been amplified, but existing rudimentary continual learning capabilities limit ability of AI to effectively manage HPCs. This paper reviews emerging directions beyond monolithic transformers, emphasizing agentic AI and brain inspired architectures as complementary paths toward sustainable, adaptive systems. We propose LIFE, a reasoning and Learning framework that is Incremental, Flexible, and Energy efficient that is implemented as an agent centric system rather than a single monolithic model. LIFE uniquely combines four components to realize self evolving network management and operations in HPCs. The components are an orchestrator, Agentic Context Engineering, a novel memory system, and information lattice learning. LIFE can also generalize to enable a variety of orthogonal use cases. We ground LIFE in a specific closed loop HPC operations example for detecting and mitigating latency spikes experienced by critical micro services running on a Kubernetes like cluster.
2604.12874.paper_summary_zh: 快速進步的人工智慧改變了高效能計算（HPC）使用的特性，例如尺寸設定、資源配置和執行。能源需求不僅被放大，現有的基本持續學習能力也限制了人工智慧有效管理HPC的能力。本文回顧了超越單體Transformer的新興方向，強調代理型人工智慧和受大腦啟發的架構作為通向可持續、自適應系統的互補途徑。我們提出了LIFE，一個推理和學習框架，具有增量性、靈活性和能效，並作為一個以代理為中心的系統實施，而不是單一的單體模型。LIFE獨特地結合了四個組件，以實現HPC中自我演變的網絡管理和操作。這些組件包括一個協調器、代理上下文工程、一個新穎的記憶系統和信息晶格學習。LIFE還可以概括以支持各種正交用例。我們將LIFE根植於一個特定的閉環HPC操作示例，用於檢測和減輕在類似Kubernetes的集群上運行的關鍵微服務所經歷的延遲峰值。
2604.12874.author: Anne Lee et.al.
